# All tests

## Why this folder exists

Single folder for Vitest unit tests and Playwright e2e/a11y specs.

## What is here

- *.test.ts(x) — Vitest
- *.spec.ts — Playwright
- setup.ts, guestProjectSetup.ts — helpers
- INVENTORY.md — auto file list (npm run docs:sync)

## Rules

- No subfolders — flat layout with prefixed names
- No co-located tests in features/

## See also

- `docs/TESTING.md`
- `tests/INVENTORY.md`

---
*Generated by `scripts/generate-contents-md.mjs` — edit manifest, then `npm run docs:sync:all`.*
